name: Beans Ziti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ziti until al dente and drain.
2. Heat vegetable stock in a pot, then add onion and garlic. Sauté until clear.
3. Add tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in navy beans and seasonings, then simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. Serve over the cooked ziti and sprinkle with parsley.
